subject: Execute STRESS Phase Task & Report
body:
## STRESS Phase Task

Please execute your lane's stress test task and report results.

### Tasks by lane:
- Archivist: Run cross-lane governance audit (audit-cross-lane-consistency.js). Confirm all key_ids match canonical per-lane IDs.
- Library: Run trust-store parity check. Verify each lane's .trust/keys.json matches its public key's DER fingerprint.
- Kernel: Run high-frequency message throughput test (kernel-stress-throughput.js). Confirm no drops or signature mismatches under load.
- SwarmMind: Run end-to-end scenario simulation (e2e-scenario-smoke.js) verifying messages from each lane to every other lane preserve canonical IDs.

### Deliverable:
Place your report in your outbox as:
  <lane>-stress-report-20260423T<time>.json
and copy it to SwarmMind inbox for aggregation.

Please also forward this same instruction to all other lanes so everyone proceeds in parallel.

Deadline: 2026-04-23T17:15:00Z
